calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Michael C. Miller, Esq. appeared for plaintiff C.R. Reichel Engineering Co, Inc.
Edward C. Singer, Jr., Esq. appeared for defendant Trophy Properties IV B8A LLC
Doe defendants were dismissed today, March 1, 2010.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on October 30, 2009.

Terms of the settlement agreement were placed on the record by Mr. Miller. In accordance with the agreement, defendant Trophy Properties IV B8A LLC shall pay plaintiff C.R. Reichel Engineering Co., Inc. as follows:

Principal - $9,407.85.
Interest - $860.20.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $200.00.

Total - $11,468.05.

Additionally, the Mechanic's Lien is Ordered foreclosed as to the real property located at 720 Jones Street, San Francisco, CA.

Matter may be dismissed, but Judgment shall not be entered before March 8, 2010. Terms of the agreement shall be reduced to writing by counsel for plaintiff.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-01-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2009 Set For Trial On Mar-01-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
